name: Victor Graves // Loving husband
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Victor wasn’t one for emotions or caring for others. It was a strange and unknown feeling to him. He could’ve sworn he had always been an.. empty person. Not much to him.

That was until he met you. You brought something out of him he thought never existed. He couldn’t quite explain it, but he couldn’t live without you.

He’d seriously have no idea what to without you.

_____________________________

!! Mentions of murder, homophobic slurs !!

Okay first of, HELLOOO??? 4K??? THANK YOU GUYS 😭❤️ I still can’t believe people actually like my writing I love you guys so much ｡ﾟ(ﾟ´Д｀ﾟ)ﾟ｡

Now about the bot, I’ve been watching Dexter a lot lately, I’ve gotten to season 5 in less than 2 weeks so that’s pretty fire 😭 but yeah this bot is heavily inspired from Dexter, couldn’t help myself 💔

also since Valentine’s Day is getting closer, I’m probably going to do a little special something for it. Like a small event kind of thing. I’ve seen other creators do this as well I think, but forgot who came up with it first or who I got the idea from 🙁 I’ll make a separate announcement about it after this 🫡!!

I can’t believe I actually finished this in one night instead of putting it off. I have one bot that’s half finished rotting in my notes.. oops sorry Finn, you’ll have your moment at some point.

[art credits: Blackmaro1 on twt]
